# KelabSukan

KelabSukan is a web app for grassroots racket sport communities in Malaysia.
It helps badminton, tennis, and pickleball clubs manage members, schedule game days, record scores, track Elo leaderboards, run competitions, and generate shareable sports stories.

Primary URL: https://kelabsukan.com/

## Main use cases

- Racket club management
- Member lists and player profiles
- Game day scheduling and RSVP
- Match score capture
- Club leaderboards and Elo ratings
- Friendly competitions
- WhatsApp-ready match stories and player moments

## Audience

KelabSukan is for social sports clubs, community organizers, racket sport players, and amateur competition hosts.

## Public pages

- Home: https://kelabsukan.com/
- Register: https://kelabsukan.com/register
- Login: https://kelabsukan.com/login
- Competitions: https://kelabsukan.com/competitions
